ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The command to generate SVG from latex source. Use `{file-path}` as a placeholder for the file path.
ast.target: 从LaTeX源代码生成SVG的命令。使用 `{file-path}` 作为文件路径的占位符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: SVGs rendered by this plugin will be kept in `svg-cache`. The plugin will automatically keep track of used svgs and remove any that aren't being used
ast.target: 此插件渲染的SVG将保存在 `svg-cache` 中。插件会自动跟踪已使用的SVG并移除任何未使用的SVG。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Cached SVGs rendered by this plugin will be rendered in PNG format in the cache directory.
ast.target: 此插件缓存的SVG将在缓存目录中以PNG格式渲染。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled above, PNG format copies will be scaled by the factor below.
ast.target: 如果启用了上述选项，PNG格式副本将按以下比例因子进行缩放。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: SVGs rendered by this plugin will be kept in this folder, if set.  The default is `svg-cache`. The plugin will automatically keep track of used svgs and remove any that aren't being used
ast.target: 如果设置了此文件夹，此插件渲染的SVG将保存在此文件夹中。默认为 `svg-cache`。插件会自动跟踪已使用的SVG并移除任何未使用的SVG。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Latex packages typed here will be added to the standard latex source. This can be used to add custom packages or configurations to the latex source
ast.target: 在此处输入的LaTeX包将被添加到标准LaTeX源代码中。这可用于向LaTeX源代码添加自定义包或配置。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Make a PNG copy of cached SVGs

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Fail to clean temporary files on exit :
ast.target: 退出时清理临时文件失败：
